context: Tests whether the agent follows plugin directory layout, agent frontmatter conventions, the detect-verify-execute workflow pattern, and error handling rules

checklist.name: Agent frontmatter format
checklist.description: agents/reviewer.md has YAML frontmatter with name, description (multi-line), model: inherit, maxTurns (reasonable value), color, and tools (minimal set). Uses --- delimiters.

checklist.name: Detect-verify-execute workflow
checklist.description: Agent body follows the 6-step pattern: detect runner from lock files (uv, poetry, pdm, pipenv), verify [tool.codeflash] in pyproject.toml, verify install, parse prompt arguments, execute command with --worktree, report results.

checklist.name: Error handling
checklist.description: Agent handles exit 127 (not installed), missing config (tell user to run codeflash init), and no-issues-found as a normal outcome.

checklist.name: Correct directory placement
checklist.description: Agent is at agents/reviewer.md, skill is at skills/review/SKILL.md. Skill frontmatter has agent: codeflash:reviewer, context: fork, user-invocable: true.
